scripts.postinstall:
rm -rf node_modules/.vite && if [ -f /etc/systemd/system/kapable-app.service ]; then printf '#!/bin/bash
set -e
export PATH=/usr/local/bin:/root/.bun/bin:$PATH
cd /app
exec bun start
' > /app/start-container.sh && chmod +x /app/start-container.sh && mkdir -p /etc/systemd/system/kapable-app.service.d && printf '[Service]
ExecStart=
ExecStart=/app/start-container.sh
WorkingDirectory=/app
' > /etc/systemd/system/kapable-app.service.d/start-cmd.conf && systemctl daemon-reload && echo 'Systemd drop-in written'; fi
